reviews.comment:
Mala atención, y poco interés por parte de los playeros en hacer su trabajo, estando en el surtidor sin otros clientes demoraron más de 15 minutos en venir a realizar la carga, en varias ocasiones me paso lo mismo, se forman largas filas para cargar. Tienen más prioridad los extranjeros que los compatriotas. Es lamentable

(Translated by Google)
Poor service and little interest from the beach attendants in doing their job. Even though we were at the pump with no other customers, it took them more than 15 minutes to come and fill up. The same thing happened to me several times: long lines formed to fill up. Foreigners are given priority over fellow citizens. It's regrettable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1MVl1WE5BEAE

reviews.comment:
Después de llenar el tanque pido la llave del baño.....de muy mala manera me dicen que está ocupado ...¿Un solo baño para toda la estación? Increíble...

(Translated by Google)
After filling up my tank, I asked for the bathroom key... and they rudely told me it was occupied... One bathroom for the entire station? Unbelievable...
